nodes.label: Pure shared math (src/utils.ts)
nodes.rationale: Kept dependency-free, no DOM, no figma global, because it is imported by both the sandbox and UI iframe contexts.

nodes.label: UI<->sandbox message contracts (src/types.ts)
nodes.rationale: Typed UiMessage (UI->sandbox) and PluginMessage (sandbox->UI) contracts because the two isolated contexts communicate only over postMessage.

nodes.label: Semantic tokens (Tokens collection, Light/Dark modes)
nodes.rationale: Each token is a VariableAlias per mode onto a primitive step; layered Radix/Stripe style set (bg/*, text/*, border/*, action/*, feedback).

nodes.label: Color-family role model
nodes.rationale: Tokens resolve by a family's explicit role (neutral/primary/secondary/success/warning/danger/none), not by name, so renaming a family doesn't change which is Primary; neutral+primary required, others skip-and-report.

nodes.label: Component library (COMPONENT_LIBRARY + builders)
nodes.rationale: Metadata is pure data; each builder is defensive so one failure never aborts the pass; components wired to variables with literal-value fallback when a token is absent.

nodes.label: Find-or-update, never duplicate convention
nodes.rationale: Collections, variables, and text styles are looked up by name and reused so re-running the plugin updates values in place instead of creating duplicates.

nodes.label: Two Vite builds (sandbox IIFE + inlined UI)
nodes.rationale: Two separate Vite builds because the two targets differ: sandbox needs a single IIFE with figma API; UI needs a self-contained inlined HTML with no figma API.
nodes.norm_label: two vite builds (sandbox iife + inlined ui)

nodes.label: warn-figma-dynamic-page-sync hookify rule
nodes.rationale: Because manifest.json sets documentAccess: dynamic-page, synchronous document APIs (currentPage setter, getLocal* accessors) throw at runtime; the async variants must be used. Guards against the 2026-07-14 set_currentPage bug.

nodes.label: Build Plugin CI pipeline
nodes.rationale: Uses npm install (not npm ci) because no lockfile is committed; typecheck -> lint -> build -> zip dist + manifest -> upload artifact.

nodes.label: TypeStyle editable type-style data model
nodes.rationale: Moves typography from fixed levels + sparse overrides to an explicit editable list; all scale math resolved in the UI, sandbox writes final values.

nodes.label: ColorRole family metadata
nodes.rationale: role is family metadata independent of name so the plugin knows which family is Primary vs Neutral instead of guessing by name or position.

nodes.label: SEMANTIC_TOKENS layered token map
nodes.rationale: Each token names a role plus Light/Dark steps; no token hard-codes a family name so resolution is role-driven. action/secondary falls back secondary->neutral.

nodes.label: Modern two-column Figma-native UI
nodes.rationale: Controls left, live preview right, theme-aware via var(--figma-color-*), window capped at <=70% viewport height.

nodes.label: Whole industry-standard design-system goal
nodes.rationale: Ship one unified, merged opinionated set (not per-brand modes, not cherry-picking) distilled from W3C DTCG taxonomy and Material 3 / Tailwind / Radix / Polaris / Carbon practice.

nodes.label: Component library (Phase 2 spec)
nodes.rationale: Deferred to Phase 2 because the Figma component/auto-layout/variable-binding API is verbose and easy to get subtly wrong; keeps Phase 1 shipping cleanly.

nodes.label: One-click Generate entire system (Phase 1)
nodes.rationale: Each generator gains a silent flag; generateAll reuses existing functions in sequence then posts one combined done + notify, avoiding duplicated logic.

nodes.label: generateScale (11-step color ramp)
nodes.rationale: Applies a fixed perceptual lightness ramp per step keeping hue/chroma from the base, easing chroma at extremes to avoid clipping; OKLCH is the recommended default space.

nodes.label: Hand-written OKLCH/HSL/HSB color conversions
nodes.rationale: Hand-written via Bjorn Ottosson matrices with sRGB gamut clamping instead of a color library, so utils.ts stays dependency-free and runs in both contexts.

nodes.label: appendChild cross-page-reparent bug
nodes.rationale: Fixed in generateDocsPage/generateComponents by switching the current page before building nodes on their target page.

nodes.label: Pivot to unified merged design-system approach
nodes.rationale: User prefers a consolidated design system over cherry-picking references (Stripe/Vercel/Apple/MD3); ship ONE distilled token set, not per-brand modes.
nodes.norm_label: pivot to unified merged design-system approach
